scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @opptrix/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w opptrix-client
scripts.serve: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,cyan "npm run start" "npm run preview -w opptrix-client -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.clean: find packages apps -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf client-ui/dist
